scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:vyro: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev:backend" && sleep 4 && node open-in-vyro.mjs http://localhost:3007
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && cd backend && ruff check . && black --check . && isort --check .
